name: hook-pattern
description: React hooks in apps/web follow a consistent pattern: useState for tracking loading/error/result state, call service methods, return state + actions. See useAgentChat and useMCPAgent for reference implementations.
relevantCode: const [state, setState] = useState<{isLoading, error, ...}>({...}); return {...state, action1, action2}
recommendation: Follow this pattern for the new useAIChat hook
